name: provider-onboarding-wizard
outcome_goal: Build an interactive CLI wizard that onboards a new model into the routing table safely. Flow: detect available models via provider CLI or API probe -> propose capability assignments from the 10 cap_* columns on provider_model_candidates (cap_language_high, cap_build_high/med/low, cap_analysis_architecture_research, cap_research_fan, cap_review, cap_tool_use, cap_image) -> require operator approval -> run a smoke probe job through the canonical workflow runner -> only then flip status='active'. Reachable as `praxis workflow tools call praxis_provider_onboard`. This closes the root cause of session-scoped routing bugs (see BUG-6DDC72E5) where models entered the route table without validation.
anti_requirements: Do not auto-activate a model without explicit operator approval.
Do not bypass the smoke probe — a model must prove it can roundtrip at least one real request before status flips to 'active'.
Do not write capability_tags; write typed cap_* boolean columns only.
